blockdesc-onedrawer-*: Store many of a single item type, upgradable.
blockdesc-drawertrim-*: Trim allows for expanding drawer controller managed drawers.
itemdesc-drawerupgrade-void: Void upgrade allows a drawer to receive items even when full. Voids excess.
itemdesc-drawerupgrade-push: Push upgrade allows a drawer to push items it contains into non-drawer inventories it is adjacent to.
itemdesc-drawerupgrade-pull: Pull upgrade allows a drawer to pull items from non-drawer inventoires it is adjacent to.
itemdesc-drawerkey-lock: Lock Key will lock a drawer to the item it currently contains, even if it is emptied.
itemdesc-drawerkey-label: Label Key will hide/show the item and amount in a drawer. Due to requiring a custom renderer, hiding labels in very large drawer systems can help FPS.
itemdesc-drawerkey-value: Value Key will hide/show the amount contained in a drawer. Hiding can help FPS in large drawer systems.
